# Portfolio Website Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
- **Project**: Professional multilingual portfolio website for Mustafa Alrubaei (Civil Engineer)
- **Framework**: Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **i18n**: next-intl (NL, FR, EN - Dutch default)
- **UI Components**: Shadcn UI + Lucide React
- **Theme**: Industrial Professional (Navy Blue, Slate Gray, Safety Orange)

## Setup Progress

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md exists
- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Content Structure
- **Hero**: Mustafa Alrubaei, Civil Engineer (B.Sc.) & Business Administration
- **Experience**: Dethier (2024-Present), Verwater (2022-2024), Van Laere (2019-2022)
- **Skills**: AutoCAD, MS Project, Aproplan, EHBO, Steigercontroleur, VOL VCA, IS-006
- **Languages**: Arabic (Native), Dutch (Good), English (Good), French (Basic)
